dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome back, here's your overview for today.

organizations.title: Organizations
organizations.subtitle: Manage your connected organizations and sources
organizations.noOrganizationsDescription: Connect your GitHub or GitLab organization to start reviewing pull requests.
organizations.syncGithub: Refresh team members from GitHub organizations
organizations.syncGitlab: Refresh team members from GitLab groups
organizations.gitlabTokenDescription: Enter your GitLab Personal Access Token to connect a group or project.
organizations.selectOrganizationDescription: Choose an organization from the list to view and manage its settings.
organizations.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this organization? This will delete all associated repositories and settings.
organizations.deleteConfirmWarning: All repositories and their review history will be permanently deleted.

settings.automaticReviewTriggerDescription: When to automatically trigger code reviews
settings.automaticSummaryTriggerDescription: When to automatically trigger PR summaries
settings.removeOrganizationDescription: This will remove the organization and all its data from Reviewate.
settings.adminRequired: Only organization admins can update settings
settings.saveFailed: Failed to save settings. Please try again.

repositories.title: Repositories
repositories.noRepositoriesDescription: This organization has no repositories yet.
repositories.name: Name
repositories.settingsDescription: Override organization defaults for this repository
repositories.resetToDefaultsDescription: Clear all repository-specific settings and inherit from organization
repositories.removeRepositoryDescription: This will remove the repository and its settings.
repositories.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to remove this repository? This will delete all associated settings and review history.

team.title: Team Members
team.noMembersDescription: This organization has no members synced yet.
team.settingsDescription: Configure how Reviewate interacts with this member's pull requests.
team.reviewateEnabledDescription: When enabled, Reviewate will automatically review this member's pull requests.
team.adminOnlyMessage: Only organization admins can modify member settings.

linkedRepos.title: Linked Repositories
linkedRepos.description: Additional repositories pulled during reviews for context (shared libraries, internal packages).
linkedRepos.orgDescription: These repositories are included in ALL reviews for this organization.
linkedRepos.repoDescription: These repositories are included IN ADDITION to organization-level linked repos.
linkedRepos.noLinkedReposDescription: Link external repositories to give the code reviewer context from related codebases.
linkedRepos.invalidUrl: Enter a valid GitHub or GitLab repository URL

pullRequests.title: Pull Requests
pullRequests.onlyAuthorCanReview: Only the PR author can trigger a review

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your account and connected services

accounts.title: Connected Accounts
accounts.disconnectFailed: Failed to disconnect account. Please try again.
accounts.cannotDisconnectLast: You cannot disconnect your last connected account.
accounts.lastAccountWarning: You must have at least one connected account to sign in.
accounts.alreadyLinked: This provider is already connected to your account.
accounts.accountInUse: This account is already linked to another user.

profile.title: Profile
profile.emailDescription: Your email address for notifications and communication
profile.saveFailed: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

settings.darkModeDescription: Switch between light and dark theme

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in with your account to continue

auth.termsNotice: By continuing, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

tour.mobileNotSupported: The tour is only available on desktop

welcome.title: Welcome to Reviewate!
welcome.description: Let us walk you through the key features. This will only take a minute.

reviewButton.title: Review a Pull Request
reviewButton.description: Click the Review button to trigger an AI-powered code review on any pull request.

prSwitch.title: Filter Your PRs
prSwitch.description: Toggle between your own pull requests and all pull requests across your organizations.

orgSidebar.title: Your Organizations
orgSidebar.description: Filter the dashboard by organization, or click the settings icon to manage them.

addOrg.title: Connect Your Repos
addOrg.description: Add an organization from GitHub or GitLab to start reviewing pull requests. Reviewate syncs your repos and team automatically.

generalSettings.title: Review Triggers
generalSettings.description: Configure when Reviewate automatically triggers reviews — on PR creation, new commits, or by label.

linkedRepos.title: Linked Repositories
linkedRepos.description: Link external repositories so Reviewate can access code context during reviews — for example, a shared library or a monorepo dependency.

repositoriesTab.title: Repository Settings
repositoriesTab.description: Each repository can override the organization defaults. Click here to manage per-repo settings.

teamTab.title: Team Management
teamTab.description: View team members and control who gets automatic reviews. That's the end of the tour!

types.network_error: Could not connect to the code hosting platform. Please check your network and try again.
types.authentication_failed: Authentication failed. The access token may have expired.
types.not_found: The repository or pull request could not be found.
types.request_failed: The request to the code hosting platform failed. Please try again.
types.invalid_response: Received an unexpected response from the platform.
types.explorer_error: Failed to download and analyze the source code. Please try again.
types.validation_error: The AI model returned an invalid response. Please try again.
types.interrupted: The review was interrupted before it could complete.
types.timeout: The review timed out. The pull request may be too large.
types.container_error: The review environment encountered an issue. Please try again.
types.internal_error: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
types.unknown: The review failed. Please try again.
